title: senecio barbarae
intro: Senecio barbarae, also known as Senecio or Raoul's Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing liver damage, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Senecio barbarae can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
